summary: Testing iteration 9: Stream page (Netflix-style video hub) and Document Studio agent-specific templates. All features working correctly. Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed). Frontend: 100% - all new features verified.
passed_tests: ✅ Stream page loads at /stream with Netflix-style layout
✅ Stream page shows hero banner with featured video
✅ Stream page shows 10 category rows (Trending Now, Documentaries, Comedy, Horror, Sci-Fi, Animation, etc.)
✅ Stream page shows 248 video thumbnails with titles, creators, year badges
✅ Click on video opens embedded player modal inside the app
✅ Close button on player modal works correctly
✅ Stream search works - 'charlie' returns 100,161 results with Charlie Chaplin films
✅ Back button on Stream page navigates to home
✅ Stream navigation item visible in sidebar with Film icon (red)
✅ Backend /api/stream/categories returns 18 categories
✅ Backend /api/stream/browse returns videos for multiple categories
✅ Backend /api/stream/search?q=charlie returns search results
✅ Backend /api/stream/category/comedy returns comedy videos
✅ Backend /api/stream/category/documentaries returns documentary videos
✅ Backend invalid category returns 404
✅ Video structure has all required fields (id, title, thumbnail, embed_url, watch_url)
✅ Document Studio shows all 6 AI Agents (General, Lawyer, Accountant, HR, Marketing, Academic)
✅ Document Studio templates change based on selected agent
✅ Lawyer agent shows legal templates (NDA, Contracts, Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Employment Agreement)
✅ Accountant agent shows financial templates (Invoice, P&L, Budget, Financial Report, Expense Tracking)
✅ HR agent shows HR templates (Job Description, Onboarding Checklist, Offer Letter, Performance Review)
✅ Marketing agent shows marketing templates (Press Release, Campaign Plan, Sales Proposal, Case Study)
✅ Academic agent shows academic templates (Research Paper, Thesis Outline, Literature Review, Grant Proposal)
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with lawyer agent returns legal content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with accountant agent returns financial content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with hr agent returns HR content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with marketing agent returns marketing content
✅ Backend /api/document/generate with academic agent returns academic content
critical_code_review_comments: Stream page implementation is well-structured with Netflix-style UI (hero banner, category rows, video cards)
Internet Archive API integration works correctly with caching (30 min TTL) for performance
Video player uses iframe embed from archive.org which works well inside the app
18 categories defined in STREAM_CATEGORIES with proper queries for each genre
Document Studio agent-specific templates are comprehensive and domain-appropriate
Agent prompts in backend provide good domain expertise for each agent type
seed_data_creation: None - Stream uses Internet Archive public API (no auth needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 tested Stream page (Netflix-style video hub with 18 categories, Internet Archive integration, embedded video player) and Document Studio agent-specific templates (6 agents with domain-specific templates). All features working correctly. Previous iterations confirmed: chat formatting, sidebar collapse, image retry, Document Studio AI agents, Build page overhaul all working.

stream_page.details: Netflix-style layout with hero banner, 10 category rows, 248 video cards, embedded player modal, search functionality

stream_api.details: 18 categories, Internet Archive integration, caching, proper video structure

document_studio_templates.details: Each agent shows domain-specific templates, chat header updates correctly
